subject: Remove ovn4nfvk8s network plugin
commit_message:
Remove ovn4nfvk8s network plugin

As ovn4nfv networks are now handled on k8s side by created CRD, this
plugin is no longer necessary. Removed all references to ovn

Issue-ID: MULTICLOUD-733
Signed-off-by: Konrad Bańka <k.banka@samsung.com>
Change-Id: I7ad6c6d9b3b4fd8f249796f437e69c7df4e701cc

Patch Set 7:

Hi Ritu,

Thanks for finding some leftover code that's also no longer needed. I wanted to search through code for this later on, but as you've already enriched this commit, it should work fine now :).

I've tested this change on my KUD env and everything works fine. I sometimes have some issue with sink configmap creation, but it's totally unrelated to MULTICLOUD-733, so I'll try to reproduce it if possible and troubleshoot
